# Fluent — Full overview

> Specialist courses for small business owners, packaged as installable AI Course Skills with a downloadable course in every one. Individual Course Skills are £14.99 each while we launch; multi-skill bundles save more.

Fluent is a trading name of Intelligent Impact Group Ltd, registered in England & Wales. Website: https://fluent.md. Contact: hello@fluent.md.

## What Fluent is

Fluent turns specialist business know-how into Course Skills. Each one is the same course, packaged twice:

1. As an installable AI skill that drops into Claude, ChatGPT or Gemini, where it runs as a specialist coach on your actual business.
2. As a properly designed ebook PDF, for the moments you don't want to be looking at a screen, or need to sense-check what the AI just told you.

The reasoning behind the two formats: AI always needs sense-checking, and you can't beat real human intuition. The ebook is there so you can read, think, and verify, not just prompt.

## What a "Course Skill" is

Course Skill is the product format name. Every Course Skill contains:

- A SKILL.md persona file (the specialist coach your AI becomes).
- Four or five reference documents covering the methodology in depth.
- Four or five working worksheets: the structured exercises your AI walks you through.
- A HOW-TO-INSTALL guide for each platform (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini).
- The full course as a designed ebook PDF.

Around 70 pages of engineered material each, written tight and ready to go. (Fluent uses "worksheet", never "artefact".)

## The catalogue (£14.99 each at launch)

- How To Price Your Offers — find the right price for your offers, articulate your value, respond to pricing objections, and build a pricing strategy that reflects what your work is worth.
- How To Sound Human Using AI — use AI to produce content without sounding like everyone else who uses AI; describe your voice, write prompts that produce human first drafts, and spot the patterns that make AI writing feel robotic.
- How To Add AI Audio To Your Content — add natural AI narration to videos, slides and training; choose the right voice, write scripts that sound natural spoken, and build a repeatable workflow.
- How To Win Your Local Market — sharpen your local customer profile and UVP, get found online (Google Business, local SEO), build the offline network that drives word of mouth, and convert through social proof and loyalty.
- How To Turn One-Time Buyers Into Loyal Customers — a 30-day plan to turn one-time buyers into repeat customers and repeat customers into advocates, with a communication system, loyalty offers, and the metrics that prove it's working.
- How To Build Know, Like, Trust In 30 Days — a 30-day journey of specific daily actions across visibility, personal connection and credibility, so your audience knows about you, warms to you, and trusts you.
- How To Create Content That Pulls People In — the secrets of magnetic content (resonance, repurposing, distribution, measurement, consistency), a deep idea bank from your audience's real questions, and a working 90-day content calendar.
- How To Manage Your Time Effectively — the 3 P's system (Prioritise, Plan, Produce) for owners who reach the end of the day wondering where it went: cut the list, plan the week, and get the work that matters done.

New Course Skills drop roughly weekly. More are in production, including small business finance and content marketing.

## Bundles

Buy several Course Skills together and save. Each bundle delivers the individual skills (AI skill plus ebook) for each title it contains.

- The Audience Trio — £29: Build Know, Like, Trust In 30 Days + Create Content That Pulls People In + Sound Human Using AI. For owners growing an audience: get known, make content that lands, sound like yourself doing it. Three skills for the price of two.
- The Get-Paid Trio — £29: Price Your Offers + Turn One-Time Buyers Into Loyal Customers + Win Your Local Market. The money one: charge properly, keep customers, win your patch.
- The Content Engine Trio — £29: Create Content That Pulls People In + Sound Human Using AI + Add AI Audio To Your Content. Everything for making content that sounds like you and travels.
- The Full Launch Library — £99: all eight Course Skills available at launch, in one go. The lowest price per skill Fluent offers. Scoped to the catalogue at launch.

## Pricing

- £14.99 per individual Course Skill while Fluent is launching.
- Trios (any of the three themed sets) are £29: three skills for the price of two.
- The Full Launch Library is £99 for all eight skills available at launch.
- Each individual skill is engineered to sit comfortably at £39–£49 on its own merits; prices move there after launch.

## Compatibility and delivery

- Works with Claude, ChatGPT and Gemini.
- Each download includes a native Claude Skill (.zip), the plain .md files, and the ebook PDF.
- Install: upload the zip to Claude Skills, drop the files into a ChatGPT Custom GPT, or paste the contents into a Gemini Gem. The install guide covers each, around ten minutes per platform.
- Delivery is instant: Stripe processes the payment and the next page gives you the download (every skill in a bundle is delivered at once). No account, no waiting.

## FAQ (condensed)

- Is this a course, an AI skill, or an ebook? All three. The same methodology, delivered as an installable AI skill and as a designed ebook.
- Why £14.99? Because Fluent is launching. The skills are built to sit at £39–£49; the launch price skips the ceremony of being early.
- Are there bundles? Yes. Three themed trios at £29 (three skills for the price of two) and the Full Launch Library at £99 (all eight skills available at launch).
- Can't I just prompt this myself? You could, but you probably won't. What Fluent sells is the work: the engineered methodology, references, worksheets, install guide and ebook, compressed into one product that drops in once and runs forever.
- What's inside a Course Skill? A SKILL.md persona, four to five reference documents, four to five worksheets, a per-platform install guide, and the full ebook PDF (~70 pages).
- How fast is delivery? About sixty seconds. Pay, then download on the next page.
- Can I share with my team? Yes; for ten seats or more, email hello@fluent.md for bulk pricing.
- When do new skills drop? Roughly weekly.
- What if it doesn't land? Reply to your purchase email for a no-questions refund within 14 days.

## Policies

- Refunds: 14-day, no-questions refund. Reply to your delivery email or write to hello@fluent.md. https://fluent.md/refunds.html
- Privacy: minimum necessary data, nothing sold, essential cookies only, analytics only with consent. https://fluent.md/privacy.html
- Terms: the agreement between you and Fluent, in plain English. https://fluent.md/terms.html

## Brand voice

Conversational, clever, editorial, bold. British English. No jargon, no clichés. The product format is always "Course Skill".
